title: AI Engineer

company_hook.phrase: Flash AI develops investigative software intended to help law-enforcement and public-safety

citation.supported_claim: Flash AI develops investigative software intended to help law-enforcement and public-safety

body_paragraphs.text: My background aligns well with this opportunity. One documented example from my background is the following: Cross-functional collaboration with product and engineering teams. My experience in translating requirements into deployable AI and machine learning features aligns well with the collaborative nature of this role.
body_paragraphs.reason: This opportunity allows me to leverage my skills in Python, RAG, and NLP to support Flash AI's mission.

closing_sentence: I look forward to the possibility of contributing to Flash AI's impactful work in law-enforcement and public-safety.
